summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TrustTrade escrow app payment flow changes. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified logo size, fee payer badge visibility, confirm delivery button conditional display based on payment status, and status guidance cards.

issues: React hydration errors in table components (<tr> inside <span>) - pre-existing from iteration_2

passed_tests: ✅ Landing page logo has h-20 md:h-24 classes (96x96px actual)
✅ Dashboard logo has same large size (96x96px)
✅ Auth endpoints work correctly for buyer, seller, and admin
✅ Transaction creation returns fee_paid_by field
✅ Confirm delivery blocked when payment_status is 'Pending Seller Confirmation'
✅ Confirm delivery blocked when payment_status is 'Ready for Payment'
✅ Seller confirm changes status to 'Ready for Payment'
✅ Non-admin cannot use confirm-payment endpoint (returns 403)
✅ Admin can confirm payment via POST /api/transactions/{id}/confirm-payment
✅ Payment confirmation changes status to 'Paid'
✅ Confirm payment blocked before seller confirms (returns 400)
✅ Confirm payment returns 404 for non-existent transaction
✅ Buyer CAN confirm delivery when payment_status is 'Paid'
✅ Delivery confirmation releases funds and updates status to 'Released'
✅ Fee Payer Badge visible in Transaction Detail page Price Summary section
✅ Fee Payer Badge shows 'Buyer pays fee', 'Seller pays fee', or 'Fee split 50/50'
✅ Status guidance card (blue) shows 'Awaiting Payment' when Ready for Payment
✅ Status guidance card (amber) shows 'Payment Received - Awaiting Delivery' when Paid
✅ Confirm Delivery button NOT visible when payment_status is 'Ready for Payment'
✅ Confirm Delivery button visible when payment_status is 'Paid'
critical_code_review_comments: React hydration errors in table components persist - recommend fixing <tr> inside <span> nesting issue in Dashboard.js and TransactionsList.js (pre-existing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment flow changes tested and working. Transaction flow is: Create -> Seller Confirm -> Admin marks Payment (confirm-payment endpoint) -> Buyer Confirm Delivery -> Released. The confirm-payment endpoint is admin-only (mocks payment gateway). Fee payer badge visible to both buyer and seller. Status guidance cards display for different payment states.

mocked_apis.note: Email sending is MOCKED via mock_send_email function. Payment confirmation via confirm-payment endpoint is admin-only (mocks payment gateway integration)

logo_size_4x_bigger.details: Logo has h-20 md:h-24 classes on both landing page and dashboard (96x96px actual)

fee_payer_badge_visibility.details: Fee Payer Badge with data-testid='fee-payer-badge' visible in Price Summary for both buyer and seller

confirm_delivery_conditional_display.details: Button NOT visible when payment_status='Ready for Payment', VISIBLE when payment_status='Paid'

confirm_payment_endpoint.details: POST /api/transactions/{id}/confirm-payment works for admin, returns 403 for non-admin, 400 if seller not confirmed

status_guidance_cards.details: Blue card for 'Ready for Payment', Amber card for 'Paid - Awaiting Delivery'
